steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $62$, so the answer is $62$. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
Cube, multiply, then add.
$$f(2)=7\cdot 8+6=62$$
The answer is 62.
